Thank you for contributing to currency-icon-map. Please fill in the sections below.
For larger changes, please open an issue first so we can agree on direction.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this pull request does and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Currency / country data — addition or correction
- [ ] Icon mapping — addition or correction
- [ ] New adapter / icon library
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance / refactor
- [ ] Other:

## Motivation

<!-- The "why". What problem does this solve? Link to any related issue. -->

Closes #

## Generated data

<!-- Tick if applicable. The *.generated.ts files are produced by scripts; never edit them by hand. -->

- [ ] I changed a generator script, not the generated output directly
- [ ] I ran `node scripts/generate-currencies.mjs` and/or `node scripts/generate-icon-maps.mjs`
- [ ] The icon-name-validity tests pass (every mapped name exists in its pinned library)

## Testing

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by at least one test

## Checklist

- [ ] My change is scoped to a single concern
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in the README and TypeScript types
- [ ] User-visible changes have a CHANGELOG entry (or a note explaining why one is not needed)
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
